# quafel

> quafel generates free, AI-powered personality quizzes on any topic and gives you a
> shareable result. Type a topic like "Which Hogwarts house am I?" or "What kind of coffee
> am I?" and quafel builds a custom quiz, asks adaptive questions, and reveals which
> character or type you match — no sign-up required.

## About
- quafel is a free web app. There is no account, paywall, or app to install.
- You enter any topic; an AI agent plans the quiz, writes the questions, and generates a
  personalized result you can share.
- Popular topics (personality frameworks like MBTI, Enneagram, and Big Five, plus fandoms
  like Harry Potter, Star Wars, and Disney) load instantly from pre-computed quizzes.

## Key pages
- Home: https://quafel.com/
- About: https://quafel.com/about
- Privacy: https://quafel.com/privacy
- Terms: https://quafel.com/terms
- Support / donate: https://quafel.com/donate

## Contact
- Support: support@quafel.com
